meta.title: Rise of Hitler
meta.historical_context: A fragile democracy destroyed by hate.

adolf-hitler.name: Adolf Hitler
adolf-hitler.description: Failed artist turned dictator. His rise is a warning from history.

paul-von-hindenburg.name: Paul von Hindenburg
paul-von-hindenburg.description: The aging war hero who mistakenly thought he could control Hitler.

claus-von-stauffenberg.name: Claus von Stauffenberg
claus-von-stauffenberg.description: The officer who tried to kill Hitler with a briefcase bomb.

art-school-timeline.title: Hitler the Artist 🎨✨
art-school-timeline.description: Hitler becomes a mediocre landscape painter. The 20th century is peaceful.
art-school-timeline.divergence_description: Accepted to Vienna Academy of Fine Arts in 1907.
art-school-timeline.present_day_status: Adolf Hitler is a footnote in art history books. Germany is a stable republic. The world is vastly more populous. 🎨🕊️

gallery-opening.title: Munich Gallery Opening
gallery-opening.description: Adolf Hitler displays his "Mountains of Bavaria" collection. Critics call it "boring but competent".

soviet-expansion.consequence: Stalin expands west without Nazi opposition

beer-hall-success.title: Beer Hall Victory 🍺⚡
beer-hall-success.present_day_status: The "Thousand Year Reich" lasted 15 years. Germany was partitioned in 1938. 🇩🇪⚔️

march-on-berlin.title: March on Berlin
march-on-berlin.description: The Weimar government collapses. Hitler is dictator at age 35.

assassination-success.title: Valkyrie Succeeds 🎯⚡
assassination-success.description: Hitler is assassinated in 1944. The war ends early.
assassination-success.present_day_status: July 20th is a global holiday. Claus von Stauffenberg is a hero. The Holocaust ended a year early. 🎯🕊️

operation-valkyrie.title: Operation Valkyrie
operation-valkyrie.description: The Reserve Army seizes Berlin. The SS is disarmed.

peace-deal.title: Peace with the West
peace-deal.description: Germany surrenders to the Allies, avoiding total destruction.

saved-lives.long_term: Millions of Jews and soldiers saved

art-school.title: The Academy of Fine Arts (1907)
art-school.text: Vienna. You are a young aspiring artist named Adolf. The professor is reviewing your portfolio. He looks skeptical.

plead.text: Beg for acceptance. Promise to work hard.
plead.consequence: The professor relents. You are accepted!

accept-fate.consequence: You leave in a rage. Politics becomes your new passion.

architecture.consequence: You lack the academic credentials. You end up homeless in Vienna.

beer-hall.title: The Beer Hall Putsch (1923)
beer-hall.text: Munich. You have a pistol in hand. The Bavarian leaders are speaking. It is time to seize power!

march.consequence: The police open fire. You are lucky to survive.

capture-leaders.text: Hold the leaders hostage and force loyalty.
capture-leaders.consequence: It works efficiently. Bavaria falls. Berlin is next.

prison-landsberg.title: Landsberg Prison (1924)
prison-landsberg.text: You are in a comfortable cell. You have time to think. Rudolf Hess is ready to take dictation.

write-book.consequence: The book becomes a bestseller. The movement has a bible.

give-up.text: Retire from politics. It was a mistake.
give-up.consequence: You fade into obscurity. The Weimar Republic survives.

reichstag-fire.title: The Reichstag Fire (1933)
reichstag-fire.text: The parliament is burning! It is a sign. We must demand emergency powers to stop the "Communist Plot".

seize-power.text: Demand the Enabling Act. Total power.

coalition.text: Form a normal coalition preservation government.
coalition.consequence: You are constrained by laws. The movement loses momentum.

night-long-knives.title: Night of the Long Knives (1934)
night-long-knives.text: The SA and Röhm are becoming a threat. The Army wants them gone. The lists are prepared.

purge.text: Kill them all. No rivals allowed.
purge.consequence: The SS rises. The Army swears loyalty to you.

spare.text: Spare Röhm. He is an old friend.
spare.consequence: The Army coups against the SA. Civil war erupts.

valkyrie.title: Wolf's Lair (1944)
valkyrie.text: The war is lost. Russia is closing in. Col. Stauffenberg leaves a briefcase under the table.

survive.consequence: The bomb explodes, but you survive. The conspirators are hanged.

die.consequence: BOOM. The tyrant is dead. Operation Valkyrie launches.
